## Summary
What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / sample only

## Checklist
- [ ] `./gradlew build` passes locally
- [ ] `./gradlew allTests` passes locally
- [ ] New/changed public API has KDoc
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Sample app updated if a public API changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated

## Notes for reviewers
Anything specific you'd like a closer look at — platform-specific concerns, trade-offs, etc.
